_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: Distinct gene expression profiles were observed in each of the areas sampled...Distinct copy number signatures can be appreciated...distinct somatic variants can be appreciated across different areas.
details: Demonstrated significant intra-tumoral heterogeneity with distinct gene expression profiles, copy number signatures, and somatic variants across three different tumor areas
